summary: Vaanix backend + frontend tested end-to-end. Backend: 19/19 pytest tests pass after a one-line test assertion fix (server lowercases email on register). Frontend: Welcome → Login → Chats → New chat → 1-1 chat → send text → Settings + dark toggle all work. Found and fixed a critical React rules-of-hooks violation in src/lib/theme.tsx that was throwing on every render before fix.

ui_bugs.issue: useCallbackSet hook called inside useMemo factory — violates Rules of Hooks; logged ERROR on every ThemeProvider render. Fixed by lifting useCallback to top level of ThemeProvider.

issues: Sign in / Create new account buttons have no testID (welcome-signin, welcome-register would help future automated tests)
send-btn testID only renders when input is non-empty (mic shows when empty). Spec lists send-btn — it works but is conditional. Consider always rendering send-btn (disabled) for predictable testing.

react_native_issues.issue: expo-av deprecation warning (SDK 54). Migrate to expo-audio/expo-video before next SDK bump.
shadow* style props deprecated; switch to boxShadow.

action_items: Optional: add testIDs to welcome screen buttons (welcome-signin, welcome-register) for stable Playwright runs.
Optional: render send-btn always (disabled when input empty) so tests can locate it before typing.
Plan migration off expo-av and shadow* props before Expo SDK 54.
critical_code_review_comments: theme.tsx had a Rules-of-Hooks violation (fixed). Audit other providers for similar mistakes.
server.py is 819 lines — consider splitting auth, users, conversations, ws into separate routers if it grows further (not blocking).
seed_data_creation: Created several TEST_-prefixed users via register/forgot-password tests; safe to leave (prefixed for cleanup).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend env uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (not EXPO_BACKEND_URL). Backend WS at wss://.../api/ws?token=<jwt>. Demo creds: admin@vaanix.app/admin123, aarav@vaanix.app/demo1234, meera@vaanix.app/demo1234. Run pytest with `cd /app && python -m pytest backend/tests/test_vaanix_api.py -v`.
rca_of_issue: theme.tsx:68 invoked the custom hook `useCallbackSet(setMode)` from inside the `useMemo` factory function. React's Rules of Hooks forbids calling hooks from non-top-level positions (callbacks, useMemo factories, useEffect, etc.). The fix is to call useCallback at the top of ThemeProvider and reference the resulting stable function inside useMemo's value object.
